title: Resolve Hardens Under Kaido’s Cruel War
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Tama, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Yamato, Unknown person #4 as The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
scene: The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: on-gashima in chaos...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Where did this thing come from?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's the komainu from the mainland!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Thank you TAMA! And you too, KOMACHiyO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WOOF WOOF

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hold on tight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: USOP!! Are you alright?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PayPay! Chew that stupid dog up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do it your- Self!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No Madder WHA' Habbens, I'll be okay!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course you aren't! Who could be alright after something like that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Anyways, I'm glad I'm safe at least!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey!! Bonk!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: O-TAMA, HOW DID YOU GET HERE?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I had an enemy ship bring me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: An enemy ship!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: KILLI.!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: KYAA- Oooooo OOO!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: H!HIMARU!! We need you to hold them here for three minutes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: KILL:!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it!! What is up with this shitty Baboon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where do these ants keep crawling out of!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those two are ruthless!! That big ape won't stand a chance by himself!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: o-Nami!! Don't look down on us like that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We're Samural too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We came here to fight!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Right Brain Tower: Central passage

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...Out of my way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There won't be any rest for you...

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Young Master Yamato!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: KOFF! KOFF!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Yamato....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter how strong you are, this is too much to handle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Anyone knows

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you truly are a Samural then you under- stand what you have to do!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Leave me here and save Lord momo- Nosuke!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I refuse!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If it were up to Kozuki Open...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He would never do such a thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You stubborn fool....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you trying to say, that you see me as an enemy you can beat while carrying around baggage like that....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I WON'T LET THAT STAND, YOUNG MASTER YAMATO.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Resolve Under Kaido’s Rule storyline with 44 dialogue beats. The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
